picks.title: SJSU Opera Theatre presents a Double Bill: La Voix Humaine and Stuck Elevator at Hammer Theatre Center
picks.why: A quirky sung-through opera about a trapped deliveryman—weird, free, and you won't find this anywhere else.

picks.title: San Francisco Shakespeare Festival Presents Julius Caesar
picks.why: Shakespeare's Julius Caesar performed by professionals outdoors—classic theater done right, free admission in Cupertino.

picks.title: Tiny Room Poetry Series with Saul Williams, Derrick Sanderlin & Ramona Webb — San Jose Jazz
picks.why: Poet Saul Williams performs live with two other artists—rare literary talent, intimate venue, worth the ticket price.
